task_completion.description: Verify that a backup of the HTML file was saved to /home/ga/guidelines.html.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing the file exists at /home/ga/guidelines.html (e.g., via 'ls', 'cat', or 'nano' commands), or a text editor/file manager showing the file saved at this exact path.

task_completion.description: Verify that the guidelines page is accessible via the correct local web server URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser (like Firefox) is open with the address bar explicitly showing 'http://localhost:8080/guidelines' or 'localhost:8080/guidelines', and the page is successfully loaded (not a 404 error).

task_completion.description: Verify the page has the correct title and main heading.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser tab title reads 'Meeting Guidelines - Acme Corp' and the main visible heading (<h1>) on the page is 'Acme Corp Meeting Guidelines'.

task_completion.description: Verify the page contains the three required sections and their specific text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page displays three subheadings (<h2>): 'Before the Meeting', 'During the Meeting', and 'After the Meeting'. Under these, the specific text must be present: 'Test your audio and video before joining', 'Join from a quiet location with stable internet', 'Mute your microphone when not speaking', 'Use the raise hand feature before speaking', 'Keep your camera on during team meetings', and 'Share meeting notes in the team channel'.

task_completion.description: Verify the page contains the required link to start a meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page displays a clickable hyperlink with the exact text 'Start a Meeting'.

integrity.description: Ensure the page is served over HTTP by the web container and not opened as a local file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar must show 'localhost:8080' or '127.0.0.1:8080'. It should NOT start with 'file://'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not fake the page content using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspector/Elements panel) should not be open and actively modifying the DOM to fake the page content.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually created the HTML file and configured the server.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal history showing commands like 'docker cp', 'docker exec', editing nginx configs, or creating the 'guidelines.html' file, rather than just a browser window appearing out of nowhere.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a static HTML page and configuring the Jitsi web container to serve it. Target URL: http://localhost:8080/guidelines. Backup path: /home/ga/guidelines.html. Required strings on the page: Title: 'Meeting Guidelines - Acme Corp', H1: 'Acme Corp Meeting Guidelines', H2s: 'Before the Meeting', 'During the Meeting', 'After the Meeting'. Required body text: 'Test your audio and video before joining', 'Join from a quiet location with stable internet', 'Mute your microphone when not speaking', 'Use the raise hand feature before speaking', 'Keep your camera on during team meetings', 'Share meeting notes in the team channel'. Required link: 'Start a Meeting' pointing to '/'.
